summary: Iteration 13 - Counsellor Incentive System for International Exams - All 5 features verified successfully. Backend APIs return correct structure, frontend displays all sections properly, and the incentive calculation (10% of exam amount) is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: Counsellor Incentives section (data-testid='counsellor-incentives') correctly displays Earned/Pending/Cancelled cards with amounts and counts
Dashboard.js: Branch Admin Incentives section (data-testid='branch-incentive-stats') shows branch summary and counsellor-wise breakdown table
ManageExamsPage.js: 'Incentive/Refund' column correctly displays incentive status for completed exams and refund status for cancelled exams
server.py: /api/counsellor/incentives endpoint returns correct structure with summary (total_earned, total_pending, total_cancelled_refunds, counts) and booking lists
server.py: /api/branch-admin/incentive-stats endpoint returns correct structure with branch_summary and counsellor_stats array
Incentive calculation: 10% of exam_price (₹4,000 → ₹400) working correctly when status changes to 'Completed'
seed_data_creation: Passwords were reset during testing for counsellor and branchadmin users. An exam booking exists: Lakshmi - Meta exam - ₹4,000 - Completed - ₹400 incentive earned
context_for_next_testing_agent: Counsellor incentive system fully functional. Exam booking for Lakshmi (Meta, ₹4,000) is marked Completed with ₹400 incentive earned. Test Counsellor can see their incentives on dashboard. Branch Admin sees counsellor-wise breakdown. Manage Exams page shows Incentive/Refund column.

features_verified.Counsellor dashboard 'My Incentives (Int: VERIFIED - Shows Earned (₹400), Pending (₹0), Cancelled (₹0) cards with counts. Recently Earned shows Lakshmi - Meta - +₹400
features_verified.Branch Admin dashboard 'Counsellor Incen: VERIFIED - Shows Total Earned (₹400), Pending (₹0), Completed Exams (1), Pending Refunds (₹0). Counsellor breakdown table shows Test Counsellor stats
features_verified.Manage Exams page 'Incentive/Refund' col: VERIFIED - Table header includes INCENTIVE/REFUND column. Shows '₹400 earned' for completed exam
features_verified./api/counsellor/incentives endpoint stru: VERIFIED - Returns summary (7 fields), earned_bookings, pending_bookings, cancelled_bookings arrays
features_verified./api/branch-admin/incentive-stats endpoi: VERIFIED - Returns branch_summary (6 fields) and counsellor_stats array with per-counsellor breakdown

frontend_tests.counsellor_dashboard_incentives: PASSED - Section visible with correct data
frontend_tests.branch_admin_dashboard_incentives: PASSED - Section visible with counsellor breakdown
frontend_tests.manage_exams_incentive_column: PASSED - Column visible with ₹400 earned displayed

mocked_api_note: None - Incentive calculation is real (10% of exam_price). All API endpoints return real data from MongoDB.
